# MarielPort

> Strategic intelligence and analysis on Cuba's Port of Mariel, the Mariel Special Development Zone (ZED Mariel), Caribbean shipping, and Cuba trade and investment.

## Overview
- [Home](https://www.marielport.com/): Cuba's gateway to global trade — strategic intelligence on Mariel Port and ZED Mariel
- [Port Profile](https://www.marielport.com/port-profile.html): Comprehensive guide to the Port of Mariel — history, specifications, capacity, operators
- [Investment Opportunity](https://www.marielport.com/opportunity.html): ZED Mariel Special Economic Zone — regulations, investment framework, approved sectors, incentives

## Key Data
- [Economic Sectors](https://www.marielport.com/sectors.html): Manufacturing, biotech, energy, logistics, tourism, agro-industry — sector breakdown with investment data
- [Infrastructure Network](https://www.marielport.com/network.html): Multimodal transport connections — shipping routes, rail, road, utilities, zone layout

## Contact
- [Contact & Consultation](https://www.marielport.com/contact.html): Investment advisory, port intelligence, regulatory compliance guidance

## Key Facts
- Port of Mariel: Cuba's premier deep-water container port, 45km west of Havana
- Operator: PSA International (Singapore), opened January 2014
- Berth: 700m, Draft: 15m, Capacity: 1M TEUs/year, Neo-Panamax capable
- ZED Mariel: 465 km² Special Economic Development Zone, established 2013
- 62 approved businesses from 21 countries, $3.5B committed investment
- 100% foreign ownership permitted under Decree-Law 313
- 10-year profit tax exemption, then 12% rate (vs 35% mainland)
- Duty-free imports of equipment and raw materials
- Full profit repatriation guaranteed by law
